TableName.description: The name of the table containing the requested items

IndexName.description: The name of a secondary index to query

KeyConditionExpression.description: The condition that specifies the key values for items to be retrieved by the Query action. Must specify the partition key name and value as an equality condition.

FilterExpression.description: A string that contains conditions that DynamoDB applies after the Query operation, but before the data is returned

ProjectionExpression.description: A string that identifies attributes to retrieve from the table

Select.description: The attributes to be returned in the result

ScanIndexForward.description: If true (default), the traversal is performed in ascending order; if false, in descending order

Limit.description: The maximum number of items to evaluate

ConsistentRead.description: Whether to use strongly consistent reads

ExclusiveStartKey.description: The primary key of the first item for this query to evaluate
